goal: Write branching, merging, remotes, and core GitHub collaboration sections (repos, forks, PRs, issues, code review).
summary: Phase 2 completed successfully. Created all six Intermediate Git & GitHub Basics sections: 05-branching.md (git branch, switch, checkout), 06-merging.md (merge, conflicts, resolution), 07-remotes.md (remote, push, pull, fetch, tracking), 08-github-repos-and-forks.md (repos, forks, README/LICENSE/.gitignore), 09-pull-requests-and-issues.md (PR lifecycle, issues, linking), 10-code-review.md (best practices, GitHub review, gh CLI). Each file follows the established style with exercises and solutions. All verified.
stepSummaries:
1. Write 05-branching.md covering git branch, git switch/checkout, basic branching workflow with commands, outputs, and an exercise. [verified]
  2. Write 06-merging.md covering git merge, merge conflicts, conflict resolution with commands, outputs, and an exercise. [verified]
  3. Write 07-remotes.md covering git remote, git push, git pull, git fetch with commands, outputs, and an exercise. [verified]
  4. Write 08-github-repos-and-forks.md covering creating repos, forking, README/LICENSE with screenshots descriptions and an exercise. [verified]
  5. Write 09-pull-requests-and-issues.md covering PR lifecycle, issues, linking PRs to issues, and an exercise. [verified]
  6. Write 10-code-review.md covering code review best practices, GitHub review features, and an exercise. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.
